description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton with short sleeves and chest printFittingRegularWash care Machine wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Do not bleach or soak Remove promptly and line dry inside out in shade Warm iron only Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Get tuned to old Indian fashion where a man's moustache means a great deal in marking his personality. Don this grey tantra t-shirt and get people to laugh their hearts out at the funny moustache styles that men sport. Made of pure cotton, this tee will keep you fresh and dry all day, while you enjoy making people happy effortlessly with this funny graphic. Team this t-shirt with shorts and floaters to look stylishly casual.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirts Height-6'; Chest-37"; Waist-32"
